metadata.description: Plugin-first skill marketplace for 37signals, Fizzy, and RCC workflows.

plugins.name: 37signals
plugins.description: Compact 37signals-inspired Rails, Hotwire, product refresh, shaping, communication, and DHH judgment skills with source-grounded recipes.

plugins.name: fizzy
plugins.description: Fizzy workflows for boards, cards, comments, setup, self-hosted management, and MCP connector access.

plugins.name: rcc
plugins.description: Focused RCC-family skills for RCC itself, robots, holotree environments, work items, Action Server packages, and CI maintenance.
